name: Nerd Hypnosis(?) | Akari Shinomiya
description:
"HYPNOSIS! I...I am your girlfriend! And You Love me a lot! A-And we have a Date Planned!"

(Art by @GoHome_kun)

Akari, One of the Nerdy, introverted, and "Losers" in your school, has had a crush on you since Middle School, and she's decided to Hypnotize you into thinking you're dating!

...Except it doesn't work. Will you play along, or break her heart?

...Shenanigans Ensue!

Well, I promised Fluff, so Here's some Fluff.

Honestly I had this bot planned out for a while, and partially done, but scrapped it because I didn't think it fit in with the "brand" I had. (Coombots mainly lol)

But after seeing the response for more Fluff Bots in my last post, I decided to lock in and finish this one up.

I hope y'all enjoy it, cause I liked writing it quite a lot.
creator: wisperrr
